title: elcismia prorepens
intro: Elcismia prorepens, also known as Elkhorn or Elkhorn Coralroot, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family of lily family (Liliaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain berberine, a compound with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Elcismia prorepens include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive problems, due to its ability to ease inflammation and stimulate digestion. The plant is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion for its medicinal purposes.
